description: Product Description LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 obd2 code reader, 7 reset functions - Oil /SAS /AT/EPB/ D.P.F./ ABS/BMS 2025 NEW version LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 OBD2 diagnostic scanner 2025 New LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 car diagnostic tool: This car scanner comes with : [7 reset functions]: EPB RESET, DPF RESET, ABS bleeding RESET, BATTERIE MATCHING, RESET HUILE, Steering Angle Calibration, ELECTRIC THROTTLE RELEARN Fixed more bugs and updated new brands up to 2025 models, including cars, SUVs, minivans, 12v light trucks. Check and reset engine / transmission / ABS / SRS DTCs. 7 reset functions: EPB (NEW), DPF RESET (NEW), ABS PURGED (NEW), BATTERY MATCH (NEW), OIL RESET, STEERING ANGLE RESET, ELECTRIC THROTTLE RESET. CRP123E V2.0 obd2 scanner a dds storage from 16G to 32G , and running memory up to 1.1Ghz, makes the scanner run faster. Read and display live PCM data streams, real-time vehicle battery monitoring and graphs. Live data can be recorded and can be played back in text format or graph format. Playback supports two graphs (independent) or 4 PID graphs (combined). Diagnostic feedback: LAUNCH TECH engineers will help you solve problems. Customized beta software is available here. Extensive vehicle coverage includes 57 vehicle manufacturers , fr-e-e lifetime Wi-Fi update with one-click online. Fast Android 8.1 operating system, 5.0 inch 720P touch screen, built-in 6100 mAh rechargeable battery. 11 languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Russian, Portuguese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Polish and Korean. Real-time battery voltage graph: Check battery status in real time and eliminate the most easily overlooked battery problems. Data stream recording and playback: Draw real-time 4-in-1 graphical data streams to help you visualize instantaneous changes in the car's engine/transmission/ABS/SRS system. Detailed analysis can be enlarged. Improve your diagnostic performance and get more orders. Printable to share with your customers. LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 obd2 scanner 's 7 most popular service resets make automotive diagnostics more convenient and driving more comfortable! LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 obd scanner supports 7 reset service, which is very useful for mechanics. [Oil reset]: this obd2 scanner allows you to perform a reset for a recalculation of the engine oil life system once the oil is changed, clear the oil light. [Steering Angle Calibration]: CRP123E V2.0 obd2 code reader helps to clear the fault steering angle sensor memories and plays an important role in steering angle sensor calibration and turns off the steering wheel warning light. [Electronic Parking Brake Reset]: Reset the brake pad after repairs have been made to the electronic parking brake system. It is important in electronic braking system maintenance, safety and efficiency when replacing the brake pad or motor. [ABS Bleed]: When the ABS contains air, the ABS bleed function must be performed to bleed the brake system and restore ABS brake sensitivity. [Throttle Position Reset]: The throttle body is a tube containing a pivoting flat valve (butterfly) which is used to control the amount of air entering the engine. In a car with electronic fuel injection, a throttle position sensor and an air flow sensor communicate with the computer, which supplies the corresponding amount of fuel required at the injectors. You may need to relearn the position of the throttle sensor after cleaning or repair. [Battery Reset] 1. Battery reset is to use the car diagnostic tool to carry out a reset process of the automobile battery monitoring unit, remove the original fault information related to the battery power shortage, make it match again, take the related information of the existing battery as standard, let the monitoring unit carry out the monitoring. 2. Battery matching is necessary in the following cases: A. To replace the main battery, it is necessary to use battery matching to eliminate the original power shortage information, prevent the relevant control modules from detecting false information, resulting in the invalidation of some electronic auxiliary functions of the vehicle, such as automatic start and stop function, activation function without a button on the sunroof, activation function without power windows, etc. B. The battery detection system sensor uses the battery pairing function to re-pair the control module and monitoring sensor, in order to more accurately detect the battery quantity usage state, avoid the instrument indication error information, causing false alarm. [DPF regeneration] 1. The DPF regeneration function is mainly to periodically use the combustion oxidation method (e.g. high temperature heated combustion, fuel additive or catalyst to reduce the flash point of particulate matter) to eliminate the collector performance and maintain optimum stability. 2. DPF regeneration is necessary in the following situations: 1). Replacing the exhaust backpressure sensor; 2). Disassembly or replacement of the particulate trap; 3). Disassembly or replacement of the fuel additive nozzle; 4). Disassembly or replacement of catalytic oxidisers; 5). DPF Regeneration Fault LAMP after lighting and Maintenance matching; 6). Maintenance and replacement of DPF regeneration control module. 4-system diagnostic tool obd2 diagnostics with in-depth inspection for engine/ABS/SRS/transmission systems LAUNCH vehicle diagnostic tools CRP123E V2.0--4 SYSTEM DIAGNOSTICS + AUTOMATIC VIN SCANNING + FULL OBDII FUNCTIONS: 4 SYSTEM DIAGNOSTICS LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 OBD2 scanner works on 12v vehicles to diagnose all 4 systems: ABS, SRS, engine and transmission. It can read and erase fault codes, turn off MIL warning lights, and 4 systems. Engine System: LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 diagnostic tool can help detect the engine ignition, fuel injection, air and fuel ratio, and exhaust emission conditions in Engine system to enhance vehicle performance, save energy and reduce exhaust emission. Transmission system: Read and clear codes and view live data in transmission systems, keeps the transmission systems output optimally adapted to the speed and load. Retrieve the error information from Automatic Transmission (AT) which is a type of motor vehicle transmission that can automatically change gear ratios as the vehicle moves,can fr-ee the driver from having to shift gears manually. Anti-Lock Braking System (ABS system): Read and clear DTCs data flow in the ABS system. Performs various tests to check the operating conditions of Anti-lock Braking System, and turn off the warning light. Supplemental Restraint System (SRS System): Safety restraint system, is made up of impact sensors, a control module, and the airbags themselves, and this diagnostic device can detect every electronic parameter to check its health status.Read and clear fault code in SRS (Airbag) system and turn off warning light of airbag for making sure engine work properly and safely. AUTOMATIC VIN SCANNING: car diagnostic tool for all cars CRP123E V2.0 obd2 code reader can automatically recognise the VIN. Automatic VIN functions allow you to quickly find out the vehicle identification number (VIN), calibration IDs, calibration verification numbers (CVN). FULL OBDII FUNCTIONS: It supports 10 OBD2 test modes, including READ CODES, ERASE CODES, LIVE DATA, ON-BOARD MONITOR TEST, I/M READINESS, FREEZE FRAME, O2 SENSOR TEST, EVAP TEST, SMOG TEST, VEHICLE INFO. Car Diagnostic Scanner LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 obd2 scanner makes analysis easy! Graphical live data stream analysis LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 scan tool shows you live sensor data and provides data graphs for intuitive diagnostics and monitor your vehicle performance, which helps customers to better analyze the abnormal parameter. The data recording functionality is amazing, the customer can record the live data stream for up to 10 simultaneous PIDs. Once they have been recorded, they can be played back in text format and/or graph format. Playback supports two (independent) or 4 (combined) PID graphs. The playback timeline can be scrolled, paused, viewed, etc. There is plenty of power in the graphs. Diagnostic playback Sharing and printing LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 obd2 scanner supports automatic generation and storage of vehicle diagnostic report which can let your mechanic know how to perform vehicle inspection and maintenance. And the diagnostic report can be shared by email and then printed. The diagnostic report can help you save time to analyze the problem, it is very good for repair shop, mechanics can print the vehicle report for customer. POWERFUL OBD2 SCANNER - LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 car diagnostic tool LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 obd2 code reader is an upgraded version of launch CRP123e V2.0, it is compatible with more vehicle manufacturers, more than 100,000+ cars. American area: For Jeep, For Usaford, For General Motors (GM), For Dodge, Chrysler, For Chevrolet, For Opel, For Cadillac, For Buick, For Lincoln, For Austford, For Acura. European Area: For VW, Volvo, For Jaguar, For Vauxhall, For Fiat, For Sprinter, For Euroford, For Smart, For Eobd2, For Skoda, For Seat, For Demo, For Saab, For Dacia, For Renault, For Citroen, For Mini, For Benz, For Audi, For Landrover, For Alfa,For Romeo,For Lancia, For Abarth, For Porsche, For Peugeot, For Bugatti, For Bmw Asian Area: For Infiniti, For Suzuki, For Subaru,For Hyundai,For Toyota, For Honda, For Tlisuzu,For Lexus, For Samsung, For Daewoo, For Nissangtr, For Nissan, For Mitsubishi,For Mazda, For Kia, For Jpisuzu Note: Please reach us to check compatibility before purchasing . car brand+ year+ functions Fr-ee lifetime wifi update LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 obd2 code reader can get the newest software by clicking update via WIFI, which can keep the scan tool up to date and help improve the usage value. Most importantly, this scan tool supports lifetime updates. Auto VIN & DTC Lookup Auto VIN allows you to quickly find out the Vehicle Identification Number (VIN), Calibration IDs, Calibration Verification Numbers (CVN). LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 obd2 code reader Built-in OBD2 scanner in DTC definition to help you accurately find the root cause of your car. Once you extract a code or DTC, you can link to websites via G.o.o.g.l.e search when looking for more information on DTCs. Diagnostic feedback function If the problem still cannot be fixed, please feedback online (Troubleshoot the problem using the diagnostic feedback function). Real-time voltage monitoring A faulty charging system will take the car out of service. As the upgrade version of CRP123E, LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 adds Real-Time Battery Monitoring, allowing you to monitor vehicle battery voltage automatically with reliable real-time graphical data. It helps you determine battery health status, get early warnings for potential battery and charging system problem. 11 languages Supported Now LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 supports up to 11 languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Russian, Portuguese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Polish and Korean. Easily change the language in the Settings menu. LAUNCH CRP123E V2.0 obd2 code reader is designed to serve users from all over the world with different background languages and this is the reason why it is multilingual. The default language of this device is English. MALL Service Since the upgrade in 2025, you can subscribe to the full functions (one brand) in the mall to know "exactly" what is wrong with your vehicle. Full function (one brand), just like the X431 series function, can support a lot of advanced OEM functions, such as full system diagnosis, bi-directional control, reset function, ECU coding and ect. Data shows that more than 35% of customers are willing to purchase the full function to enjoy a better experience. Note: Please reach us via ediag0228@ hotmail. com to check compatibility before purchase.
